notableEvents.label: Fielding error

notableEvents.label: Carlos Cortes GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Carlos Cortes grounds into a double play, second baseman Blaze Alexander to first baseman Pete Alonso. Jacob Wilson out at 2nd. Carlos Cortes out at 1st.
